channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State player, TikTok star dismissed before national championship game against Notre Dame
item.description: Former walk-on Caden Davis' Ohio State-related social media content has garnered considerable attention, but he will not in a Buckeyes uniform during the national title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Picks: Chiefs, Bills, Lions and Eagles will advance to the conference championships
item.description: The road to the NFL’s final four features seven of the eight division winners. Patrick Mahomes and the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs open the divisional round weekend against C.J. Stroud and the Houston Texans on Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels to Terry McLaurin connection has blossomed for the Commanders
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — When the Washington Commanders had to have it — fourth down, trailing in the fourth quarter of a playoff game — Jayden Daniels found Terry McLaurin in the end zone for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jack Hoffman, young cancer patient who captured hearts of Nebraska and nation with 2013 TD run, dies
item.description: Jack Hoffman, the cancer patient who captured the hearts of Nebraska football fans and inspired the nation as a 7-year-old with his touchdown run during the 2013 spring game, has died at the age of 19.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penguins waive All-Star goaltender 18 months into massive contract
item.description: Pittsburgh Penguins placed two-time All Star goalie Tristan Jarry on waivers just 18 months into a massive five year contract dur to poor play.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears' Caleb Williams reveals he was 'fuming' after Ben Johnson catfishing prank
item.description: The Bears' Caleb Williams revealed his frustration on a recent podcast appearance after he was pranked into believing the Lions' Ben Johnson had gotten Chicago's head coaching job.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cal star Alex Mack selected to College Football Hall of Fame on first ballot
item.description: Former Cal Bears star Alex Mack headed to College Football Hall of Fame along with Nick Saban, Urban Meyer, Michael Vick and Michael Strahan.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Struggling Penguins place 2-time All-Star goaltender Tristan Jarry on waivers
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — The Pittsburgh Penguins ran out of patience waiting for two-time All-Star goaltender Tristan Jarry to emerge from a slump, placing him on waivers Wednesday ahead of a pivotal seven-game road trip that could determine the course of the rest of their season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas QB Quinn Ewers declares for NFL draft as program ushers in Arch Manning era
item.description: Texas junior quarterback Quinn Ewers has declared for the NFL draft, ending a Longhorns career in which he led the program to a Big 12 championship and twice to the College Football Playoff but was not always embraced by a fan base eagerly waiting for Arch Manning to take over.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: MLB 1st-round draft pick to take shot at college football with South Alabama
item.description: Former MLB first-round draft pick Bubba Thompson will pursue collegiate football this spring as a walk-on for the South Alabama Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa State's 30-year streak of hitting a 3-pointer ends in win over Texas Tech
item.description: Iowa State's NCAA record streak of 945 consecutive games with a 3-pointer ended Tuesday night in a 71-58 victory over Texas Tech. The Cyclones had made a 3-pointer in every game dating back to Feb. 19, 1995, at Colorado when the school was still part of the Big Eight.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, Fox 5

item.title: Patrick Fishburn nearly wins first PGA Tour event
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Former BYU star Patrick Fishburn had visions of winning his first PGA Tour event. He was leading after two rounds, and one shot back after three rounds before ending up tied for sixth.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Verlander uses supermodel wife's name on Giants introductory Zoom call, causing awkward moment
item.description: (KRON) -- Justin Verlander uses his wife's account for Zoom calls, and a member of the San Francisco media got a kick out of it. His account name caused a funny moment during his introductory press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Collier takes a tumble, then hits game-winning shot
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Rookie Isaiah Collier drove for the go-ahead layup with 2 seconds left to lift the Utah Jazz to a 112-111 overtime victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Dallas Goedert fired one stiff arm to a Packers defender, smacked him again and then — in a sports city known for its Broad Street Bullies — dispatched one final shot to the face on his way to end zone.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls fall to Pacers, 2-game winning streak snapped as longest homestand of season begins
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Bulls were looking to go into their longest homestand of the season on a three-game winning streak. Instead, they'll be trying to start a new one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
